source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage Crane/Lifting Device

event.top_event: Dropped load - drill pipe and elevators falling from v-door to catwalk
event.incident_type: Structural damage; required evacuation; lost time accident
actions_taken: Both personnel attended by onsite Medic
Personnel transported ashore by boat for further evaluation and treatment
event.summary: During drill pipe lay-down operations on the Hercules 264 rig, a 3.5 inch drill pipe joint and single joint elevators fell from the v-door to the catwalk, striking two rig personnel (Floor Man and Roustabout) on the left shoulder/arm. The failure was caused by an improper-sized cotter pin on a 4-point shackle that came loose. Root causes included failure to properly rig up elevators, use correct cotter pin size, develop a rigging checklist, conduct pre-job rigging inspection, and incorporate crane crew in the Job Safety Analysis.
key_phrases: joint of pipe to fall in the v-door
failed to properly rig up the single joint elevators
failed to utilize the proper sized cotter pin
failed to develop or utilize a checklist
failed to ensure all rigging was inspected
Job Safety Analysis (JSA) failed to incorporate the crane crew personnel

threats.name: Improper cotter pin size selected and installed
Inadequate rigging inspection prior to lift
Incomplete Job Safety Analysis (JSA) - crane crew not included

consequences.name: Serious injury - broken shoulder, ruptured spleen, arm injury

controls.name: Proper cotter pin sizing and installation
controls.barrier_role: Prevent shackle nut from coming loose
controls.lod_basis: Primary mechanical control to maintain rigging integrity

supporting_text: one of the 4 point shackle's nut came off due to improper size of cotter pin
Operator/Contractor failed to utilize the proper sized cotter pin while rigging up the single joint elevators

controls.name: Pre-job rigging inspection by Driller or Tool Pusher
controls.barrier_role: Detect improper rigging before load is lifted
controls.lod_basis: Supervisory verification of rigging setup prior to lift

supporting_text: Operator/Contractor failed to ensure all rigging was inspected by the Driller or Tool Pusher prior to beginning the job task
Failure of the Driller or Tool Pusher to inspect the rigging prior to the job task beginning

controls.name: Rigging checklist for single joint elevators
controls.barrier_role: Ensure proper shackles, cotter pins, and slings are used
controls.lod_basis: Standardized procedure to verify all rigging components meet specifications

supporting_text: Operator/Contractor failed to develop or utilize a checklist for rigging up the single joint elevators to ensure the proper sized shackle(s), cotter pin(s), and slings were utilized prior to the job task

controls.name: Comprehensive Job Safety Analysis (JSA) including all personnel
controls.barrier_role: Identify hazards and controls for all personnel involved in the task
controls.lod_basis: Pre-job planning to ensure all hazards and controls are communicated to all involved parties

supporting_text: Prior to the job task, the Job Safety Analysis (JSA) developed by the drill crew failed to incorporate the crane crew personnel in the JSA for laying down drill pipe

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
